title: arthropodium paniculatum var. minus
intro: Arthropodium paniculatum var. minus, also known as the lesser cat's tail or New Zealand flax lily, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The root of the plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
